facebookAccount.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; SM-S928B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/131.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36
facebookAccount.notes: Leave email/password blank if you're using cookies in account.txt

database.notes: Replace YOUR_MONGODB_URI_HERE with your full MongoDB connection string

whiteListMode.notes: If enabled, only listed user IDs can use the bot

whiteListModeThread.notes: If enabled, only listed thread IDs can use the bot

spamProtection.notes: commandThreshold commands per timeWindow seconds triggers spam protection

autoRestart.notes: Set a cron time like '0 */6 * * *' to auto-restart every 6 hours. null = disabled
